profile: UI/UX Designer with over 5 years of experience creating user-centered interfaces for SaaS, B2B, and AI-powered products. Designed end-to-end user experiences for 10+ production applications, from research and wireframing through high-fidelity prototypes and developer handoff. Improved key product metrics including user onboarding completion rates by 25% and task completion times by 30% through data-informed design iterations. Experienced in building and maintaining design systems that ensure visual consistency across multi-product platforms. Skilled in designing intuitive interfaces for complex AI workflows, real-time dashboards, and conversational UIs that make advanced technology accessible to non-technical users.

projects.name: MakeMovie.ai – AI Multimedia Studio
projects.description: Full creative dashboard for generating AI-powered images, videos, avatars, fashion edits, and chat-assisted workflows from text prompts.
features: Designed the end-to-end creative dashboard UX including media generation flows, prompt builders, and gallery management
Created a scalable design system with reusable components for editors, preview panels, and generation controls
Designed the chat-assisted workflow interface balancing creative freedom with guided AI interactions
Conducted usability testing and iterated on navigation patterns to reduce time-to-first-generation by 35%

projects.name: JustBeMe.ai – AI Business Assistant
projects.description: AI assistant automating inbound/outbound communications across calls, WhatsApp, SMS, and email, with knowledge base answers and real-time appointment booking.
features: Designed the multi-channel communication dashboard for managing WhatsApp, SMS, voice, and email interactions
Created UX flows for AI assistant configuration, knowledge base management, and appointment booking setup
Designed responsive admin interfaces for monitoring conversation analytics and AI performance metrics
Developed wireframes and prototypes for the onboarding experience across UAE and France client variants

projects.name: Tales of You – Personalized Storybook Generator
projects.description: AI storytelling platform turning selfies and prompts into personalized children's storybooks with custom characters, narration, and interactive flipbook reading.
features: Designed the storybook creation wizard with a child-friendly, playful visual language and intuitive step-by-step flow
Created the interactive flipbook reading experience with page turn animations and narration controls
Designed the character customization interface for uploading selfies and selecting story themes
Built a cohesive visual identity and illustration style guide for consistent branding across the platform
